note: EPD reports a single Global Warming Potential (GWP 100, CML 2001) indicator for the combined A1/A2/A3 product stage = 3.9E+00 kg CO2 equiv per declared unit (1 m2 of 12.5mm plasterboard). No separate GWP-fossil/biogenic/GHG breakdown given (older EN 15804+A1 format). The summary chart rounds A1-A3 to 3.86.
